title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Tama, Unknown person #16 as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see...! I didn't actually want more!! I'm really full now!! Thank you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You're a bad liar!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah... I'm going to go wash my hands.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HOFF... she didn't make much, but... she made it for my sake.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: TAMA is a good kid!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Who are you, you bas- Tard!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Huh....!? USD... NO, YOU'RE NOT HIM!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: How dare you...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Did you eat the rice?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not sure if this is a good idea.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I did.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Who are...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You foolish man!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: UWA again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait a second, who the hell are you!? All I did was ask Tama to make me some food!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why would Tama make food for someone like you!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you know how many days it's been since that child has had food!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Stop growling, stomach!! Stop it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It's shame- full for a war- rior!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: She weaves Bamboo hats all day!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if she manages to sell all of them, she doesn't know whether she'll have enough money to last the day!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: she eats millet most of the time, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Twice a year, on her birthday and on New Year's Day, she is allowed to eat rice....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Today, I sent Tama into town so that she could buy rice for her eighth birthday!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So why were you the one who ate it!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ST...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Stop it, Master

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PLEASE FORGIVE ME FOR COOK-ING THE RICE D WITHOUT YOUR PERMISSION!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: But this person saved my life!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: PLEASE DON'T BRING SHAME TO ME!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I have been looking for a

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I'll weave more bamboo hats, so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: PLEASE FORGIVE ME!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PLEASE LET ME REPAY BIG BROTHER Luffy PROPERLY...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Cough.

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: TAMA, you fool!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you drink the water from the river to suppress your hunger!?

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Hey, Tama!!...water?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rivers in this country are contaminated because of the waste that comes from Kaido's factories!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For a young girl like her, drinking the contaminated water is just like drinking poison.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: She could live else- where, but...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ...this child has been waiting here...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: for the person who promised her that they would come back here again.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: A pirate named ACC...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: A pirate named

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: WAHA...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...We lost communications with our scout group at Kuri Beach...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: What should we do, head- liner!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't know how many there are... but we do know...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that a group of people have disembarked there!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Don't report this...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: TO KAIDOU- SAN YET.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I'll go.

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 53 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
